message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need remaining 4 approvals for consensus">
Multiple reviewers have already examined the code and approved. If you haven't sent your formal approval/consensus yet, please do so now. We have approvals from: Scott Wlaschin, Carson Gross, Luca Palmieri, and Heydon Pickering. Still need: Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, Kent Beck, Marty Cagan.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I have already sent my formal review and approval. I am Heydon Pickering and my consent was included in the team-lead's list of approvals received. No further action is needed from me.
